hero.subtitle: A digital curator dedicated to the timeless beauty of Indian hand-artistry. Bridging the gap between the master artisan and the modern connoisseur.

customer.title: For the Customer
customer.desc: Discover authenticated heritage pieces from remote clusters, delivered with the story of their origin.

learner.title: For the Learner
learner.desc: Master the ancient techniques directly from National Award-winning gurus through immersive courses.

artisan.title: For the Artisan
artisan.desc: Join a global platform designed to preserve your legacy and provide sustainable fair-trade opportunities.

footer.brandDesc: Curating the finest heritage crafts of the Indian subcontinent. Preserving legacies, one stitch at a time.
footer.newsletterDesc: Join our editorial list for early access to limited edition drops.

popup.title: Disclaimer
popup.desc: This website is only for connecting Chhattisgarh craftsmen with customers and give people a chance to learn a wide variety of traditional crafts via verified tutors. This site does not offer payment gateways and also does not ask for any donations. Happy exploring!
